variables.notes: Preferred candidate list appears to miss the semantically correct top-line label. The income statement shows 'Gross Sales' minus 'Excise taxes and other adjustments' leading to a populated 'Net sales' line, which best matches REVT. Manual review needed because 'Net sales' appears twice with identical text in column A, and only one instance is populated in the preview. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Net sales
